name: White-Bean Chili with Five Spices
recipeIngredient: or canned low sodium chicken broth (fat skimmed and discarded)
1/4 cup drained canned green chilies, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring chicken stock to boil in a large skillet.
2. Add the next 8 ingredients plus 1/2 teaspoon salt; cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors are well blended, about 10 minutes.
3. Add kidney beans; simmer until heated through, about 3 minutes.
4. Serve immediately.
